title: bidens macroptera
intro: Bidens macroptera, also known as the large-seeded beggarticks, is a perennial plant species native to eastern Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to its sesquiterpene lactones and flavonoids. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and aiding in the treatment of digestive issues and skin conditions. Bidens macroptera can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall health and well-being.
